title: Homeland Security
description: Contact information for media inquiries, agency press rooms, and the Office of Multimedia.
text:
Official websites use .gov
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.
Secure .gov websites use HTTPS
A lock (LockA locked padlock) or https:// means you’ve safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.
Below, find contact information for media inquiries and agency press rooms.
Media Inquiries - Headquarters
Office of Public Affairs (DHS HQ): MediaInquiry@hq.dhs.gov
Media Inquiries - DHS Components
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS): media@uscis.dhs.gov
U.S. Coast Guard (USCG): mediarelations@uscg.mil
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP): CBPmediarelations@cbp.dhs.gov
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA): CISAMedia@hq.dhs.gov
Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA): FEMA-News-Desk@fema.dhs.gov
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE): ICEMedia@ice.dhs.gov
Transportation Security Agency (TSA): tsamedia@tsa.dhs.gov
U.S. Secret Service (USSS): usssmediainquiry@usss.dhs.gov
Office of Multimedia, Motion Pictures and Television
Production assistance and background information, as well as facility and personnel access to screenwriters, directors, producers and authors interested in gaining a better understanding of the DHS mission and its component agencies.
Learn more about the Office of Multimedia, Motion Pictures and Television
Office of Multimedia: DHSfilmandTV@hq.dhs.gov
Keywords
Contact
Media
Point of Contact (POC)
